description: Style Note boss Orange from the designer house of hugo boss is a refreshing deodorant that keeps you smelling good all day. Strong and lasting scent marks this one out. An intensely feminine fragrance is what marks this deodorant out as one of our favourites. Product Details Boss Orange is a deodorant for women which comes in an aerosol spray canister Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
